title: Google's Agents CLI: The CLI + Skills Combination to Ship AI Agents EASILY
summary: Google's Agents CLI is an open-source tool that enables developers to build, test, and deploy AI agents to production quickly. The tool provides identity management, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails for production-grade agent deployment and works with any AI coding assistant.
writeup: This video covers Google's Agents CLI, an open-source tool for building, testing, and deploying AI agents to production. It details the production-grade features that distinguish the tool: identity management, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails, plus compatibility with any AI coding assistant. The takeaway is that these capabilities target the operational gaps in shipping agents, not just prototyping them.
